sections.heading: New
items: Skills: You can now create skills inside palmier pro. Go to settings -> skills to get started.

sections.heading: UI
items: Better ripple experience: Ripple insert, delete, trim with live preview while dragging.
Track reorder: You can now reorder tracks by dragging them

sections.heading: Fixed
items: FCPXML export: more stable export for fcpxml v1.10 - v1.14.
